selected_issue.issue: Missing per-key contract_diagnostics completeness metrics in replay assessment output
selected_issue.title: tools/replay_verification_assess.py did not report required contract-diagnostic key coverage/missing counts

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence on agent-base showed no unresolved rank 1-4 issues: canonical tests passed (365), replay assessment reported zero structural/behavioral/invariant totals, and no replay mismatch signal was present. The highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5 missing instrumentation: replay summary lacked per-required-field contract_diagnostics completeness metrics.

checks.command: python3 baseline completeness-key probe against run_assessment(raw_replay_sample)

files_changed.change: Added contract diagnostics required-key list and emitted key presence/missing counts plus presence rates.
Extended summary schema with required completeness metric properties.
Added assertions for new completeness fields and array schema-type handling.

validation_performed.result: summary includes contract_diagnostics_required_keys plus key_presence_counts/key_presence_rates/missing_key_counts with full coverage on raw fixture
new completeness metrics present with full key coverage across 6 points

before_after_evidence.before: Replay summary lacked per-field contract_diagnostics completeness keys; baseline probe showed expected keys absent.
before_after_evidence.after: Replay summary now emits required key list plus per-key presence counts/rates and missing counts, enabling field-level diagnostics completeness tracking.

unresolved_risks: Metrics validate key presence only and do not guarantee semantic correctness of each diagnostic value.
Coverage remains dependent on fixture breadth; larger replay sets may reveal value-quality issues not visible in small fixtures.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation gap is fixed and validated with minimal changes; further analytics expansion would exceed this bounded single-issue run scope.
